# BMF — Bake Manifest Format

> Spec **0.2.0**. https://github.com/MCFLAMINGO/bmf  
> npm: `@mcflamingo/bmf-sdk` `@mcflamingo/bmf-node` `@mcflamingo/bmf-cli` `@mcflamingo/bmf-gateway`

## Pitch (robotics)

Signed capability verification before a policy or body descriptor is allowed to move hardware. URDF/MJCF morphology → `kin.*` / `safety.*` in **Rust** (`bmf-core`), exposed to Node (`bmf-node`) and Python (`bmf-py`). One core for lab notebooks and fleet gateways — no TS fork of the robot parsers.

Target readers: robotics platform teams, foundation-model labs, fleet operators (Unitree, Spot SDK, Figure-class, PI, Isaac).

## Architecture

| Concern | Implementation |
|---|---|
| GLB / phys.* / anim.* | TypeScript SDK |
| URDF / MJCF / kin.* / safety.workspace.limits | **Rust bmf-core only** |
| Node FFI | `@mcflamingo/bmf-node` (napi-rs) |
| Python FFI | `bmf-py` (PyO3) |

## 0.2.0 capabilities

phys.muscle, phys.stance, phys.jump (GLB).  
kin.urdf, kin.mjcf, kin.arm, kin.dof.arm=N, kin.mobile, kin.legged.biped, kin.legged.quadruped, kin.superhuman.joints, safety.workspace.limits (Rust).

## LeRobot policy gate (0.2.1)

Rust `parse_policy` on `.tar`/`.tar.zst` → `policy.framework.lerobot` + obs/act + `safety.simonly`.  
Hardware refuse: `bmf check-safety bundle.tar.zst --hardware`  
HF fixture: https://huggingface.co/MCFL/bmf-lerobot-so100-act-fixture  
npm: `@mcflamingo/bmf-cli@0.2.1`

## Install

```
npm install @mcflamingo/bmf-sdk@0.2.0
```
